corrections.text: In the Analysis section, the article quotes Anthropic as writing "[if] the human remained involved in the highest-value tasks, the pattern looks more labor-augmenting than labor-displacing." The bracketed "[if]" signals only the capitalization change; the source's actual wording uses the present tense: "If the human remains involved in the highest-value tasks, the pattern looks more labor-augmenting than labor-displacing." The word "remains" was rendered as "remained." The meaning of the claim is unchanged.
